tweets.author: deeppressanalysis.bsky.social
tweets.text:
Trump launched a Bitcoin mining company.
Headlines screamed "crypto goes mainstream."
Meanwhile Iran was settling oil trades in crypto.
Billions of dollars. Under full sanctions.
The real case study is never the one they write about.
